# `src/types/generated`

**AUTO-GENERATED. Do not hand-edit.**

| Source | Reproduces |
|---|---|
| `specs/typespec/backend/main.tsp` | backend.rs: every model, enum, and union declared in the OpenboxBackend namespace |
| `specs/typespec/core/main.tsp` | core.rs: every model, enum, and union declared in the OpenboxCore namespace |
| `codegen/emitters/typespec-emitter-rust/src/index.ts` | the emit logic |

Regenerate with `npm run specs:compile`.
